top_patterns.description: Starts with an imperative or invitation, often ending with a hashtag.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: frequently in activism and campaign posts
example_quotes: Let’s #endgunviolencetogether - go to TOMS.com to send your representative a postcard demanding they take action.
Join us in helping with these relief efforts by donating any amount you can to these organizations.

top_patterns.description: Expresses thanks and encourages ongoing participation.
top_patterns.structure_template: Thank you + support/effort + call to action
top_patterns.when_it_appears: in campaign updates and community engagement
example_quotes: Thank you to everyone who has supported this important campaign and helped make this all possible.
Thanks to all who have reached out - our family and animals are evacuated and safe.

top_patterns.description: Shares a personal moment or feeling, often starting with 'I' or 'we'.
top_patterns.structure_template: I/we + verb + personal insight or emotion
example_quotes: I hardly slept last night. Something is stirring.
The last 10 days of my life have been the most intense and emotional in my career.

top_patterns.description: Announces a milestone or event, often with thanks.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: in updates about campaigns or personal milestones
example_quotes: We’ve already sent over 285,000 postcards to representatives, asking them to take action.
Thank you for being a part of TOMS since we started this journey 12 years ago.

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Mobilizes followers to participate or act
example_quotes: Send your postcard urging Congress to pass universal background checks.
Join us by sending a postcard to your Representative at toms.com.

archetypal_structures.formula: Thank you + support/effort + call to action
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Builds community and encourages ongoing support
example_quotes: Thank you to everyone who has supported this important campaign.
Thanks to all who have reached out — our family and animals are evacuated and safe.

archetypal_structures.formula: I/we + verb + personal insight or feeling
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Creates intimacy and shares personal motivation
example_quotes: I hardly slept last night. Something is stirring.
The last 10 days have been the most intense and emotional in my career.

language_habits.line_break_style: frequent line breaks, emphasis on clarity

example_quotes: I hardly slept last night. Something is stirring.
The last 10 days have been the most intense and emotional in my career.
Send your postcard urging Congress to pass universal background checks.
Join us in helping with these relief efforts.

anti_patterns: Generic motivational quotes without personal framing
Excessive repetition of the same phrase

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake’s captions are highly action-oriented, personal, and emotionally engaging, emphasizing community and activism.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Recent captions focus more on direct calls to action and personal reflections, less on generic statements.
